brief: Senator Lindsey Graham dies at 71; Iran strikes Gulf countries and closes Strait of Hormuz amid US retaliation. New research explores AI in crime linkage, BCI clinical translation, and visual analytics for missing data.
news_summary: Senator Lindsey Graham dies of sudden illness; Iran attacks Gulf states and closes Strait of Hormuz after US strikes. Also: UK warns on unregulated peptides, Typhoon evacuates millions in China, and AI bots used in campaign texts.
papers_summary: Papers cover visual analytics for imputation (ImputeViz), AI in crime linkage, BCI trials in China, sign language gloves, and a programming environment for creative computing (Flowcode).

en.brief: Senator Lindsey Graham dies at 71; Iran strikes Gulf countries and closes Strait of Hormuz amid US retaliation. New research explores AI in crime linkage, BCI clinical translation, and visual analytics for missing data.
en.news_summary: Senator Lindsey Graham dies of sudden illness; Iran attacks Gulf states and closes Strait of Hormuz after US strikes. Also: UK warns on unregulated peptides, Typhoon evacuates millions in China, and AI bots used in campaign texts.
en.papers_summary: Papers cover visual analytics for imputation (ImputeViz), AI in crime linkage, BCI trials in China, sign language gloves, and a programming environment for creative computing (Flowcode).

zh.brief: 今日多重颱風與地緣衝突交織，中國疏散近200萬人，美伊局勢因霍爾木茲海峽關閉而緊張。同時，韓國佛寺推出實驗性相親活動，科學研究揭示蚊蟲偏好的生化機制。
zh.news_summary: 颱風二次登陸浙江，近200萬人撤離，溫州處於風暴路徑。韓國僧侶舉辦30小時山林靜修相親，協助單身男女尋愛。研究分析人體氣味與蚊蟲叮咬的關聯性。
zh.papers_summary: 本日無優先中文論文，英文研究涵蓋AI在犯罪關聯分析中的應用、缺失數據診斷可視化、以及傳統中國畫構圖解析等領域。

todays_image.caption: Like Lobophora sp. drifting in the currents, Senator Graham's life has passed beyond the political horizon.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
